attributes.objective: Prove the public software-factory tracker module can be adopted by an external realm.
attributes.scope:
## Scope

- Render a project
- Render a ticket
- Render a knowledge article
- Verify the project ticket query resolves
attributes.technicalContext: The fixture realm adopts cards from the public `darkfactory` module URL and runs inside the software-factory Playwright harness.
attributes.successCriteria:
- [x] Public module resolves
- [x] Adopter instances render
- [x] Query-backed tickets section shows the linked ticket
attributes.risks:
- Public URL remapping could break module resolution
- Ticket query may fail if canonical card refs drift
